mission.title: ollama: Compatibility with new OpenAI responses API
mission.description: Compatibility with new OpenAI responses API. Requested by 62+ users.

steps.title: Check current Ollama setup
steps.description:
Verify your Ollama version:
```bash
ollama version
```
This feature requires a recent Ollama version with Responses API support.

steps.title: Review the OpenAI Responses API
steps.description:
OpenAI introduced a new Responses API as an alternative to the Chat Completions API. It provides enhanced capabilities including built-in tool use, structured output support, and agent-like functionality.

Ollama is tracking this API for compatibility. See the [OpenAI docs](https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/responses-vs-chat-completions) for details on the differences.

steps.title: Check Responses API compatibility
steps.description:
Test if your Ollama version supports the Responses API endpoint:
```bash
curl -s http://localhost:11434/v1/responses \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model": "llama3", "input": "Hello"}' | head -20
```
Note: This feature may still be in development. Check the [source issue](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/issues/9659) for the latest status.

steps.title: Verify compatibility
steps.description: If the Responses API is supported, verify it works with your tools. The existing Chat Completions API (`/v1/chat/completions`) remains fully supported and is not being deprecated.

resolution.summary: The Ollama team is tracking OpenAI Responses API compatibility. The existing Chat Completions API remains fully supported.

prerequisites.description: A working ollama installation or development environment.
